Legend
━━━ On-prem network plumbing
━━━ Site-to-Site VPN (LDAP back-traffic, ICT mgmt)
┄┄┄ Outbound / management flows (NAT, AD-LDAP, ICT)
Dashed boxes: AWS subnets (single-AZ — HA hardening pending)
